pages.content:
# What is social.plus?
The complete suite of pre-built features to enable in-app social experiences and fuel user engagement. Easily add all the most loved social features to your digital platform.
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus goes beyond offering the complete suite of social features to include powerful tools to analyze, moderate, and monetize your in-app communities

Access and analyze your engagement data in real-time to gain valuable user insights.
Analytics & Insights
### Build positive and safe communities
We power moderators with all the necessary tools to control and impose permissions to make your app a safer place for all users.
Moderation

pages.metaTitle: Social SDK | Build Social Features with API-based Social SDKs
pages.metaDescription: Ready-to-use feeds, groups and forums, stories, user profiles, and more customizable white-label social media features.
pages.content:
# Build your in-app community faster with a Social SDK
Build a social ecosystem effortlessly with our enterprise-ready SDKs, designed for seamless scalability and integration across all platforms.
Activity Feeds
## Deliver content that matters with personalized activity feeds
By adding Feeds to your app, users can access relevant updates via algorithmically ranked content and engage with likes and comments.
Activity Feeds
Groups and Forums
## Unite your community with groups & forums
Harness the power of communities within your app with Groups & Forums, allowing users to share their thoughts and engage with each other.
Groups
PROFILES
## Let users express themselves with personal profiles
Empower users to showcase their personalities and connect with others through personalized profiles that highlight their interests and foster meaningful relationships.
User Profiles
STORIES
## Capture & share every moment with stories
Allow users to share video and image stories, popularized by all the major social apps, and share lifeâ€™s best moments as they happen on your platform.
Stories
Social Commerce
## Make conversations discovery touchpoints
Transform your most engaging conversations into your most powerful discovery channel by adding social commerce, where any post type can surface products, services, and offerings to your community.
Social Commerce
Events
## Make your community show up with events
Create in-person, digital, or livestream events with built-in discovery, RSVP tracking, and automated reminders so your members always know what's happening and when to show up.
Events
## The most feature rich social SDK available
With social.plus, you can get up and running quickly with all the features of an engaging social platform.
All Social Features
All Social Features
## Leading brands grow with social.plus
Discover how hundreds of companies use social.plus to accelerate app growth and unlock new revenue streams
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus enables you to quickly add white-label social features to your app or website with our ready-to-use SDKs and APIs.
Chat SDK
### Turn connections into conversations
Elevate your appâ€™s social experience with chat that keeps users talking, sharing, and building connections in real time.
Explore Chat
Video SDK
### Bring moments to life with video
From live streams to social commerce, bring immersive video experiences straight to your app. Let users step inside the moment.
Explore Video

pages.metaTitle: Live Analytics & AI Insights | social.plus
pages.metaDescription: Real-time analytics and AI-driven insights that help product teams understand community behaviour and improve average revenue per user.
pages.content:
# Maximize growth with live analytics & AI Insights
Leverage powerful AI tools to get to know your users like never before and make informed business decisions.
## Take your data analysis to new heights with powerful AI tools
Our easy-to-use dashboard allows you to analyze your first-party data in real-time and access AI-powered Insights and recommendations to drive your business strategy.
Topic Analysis
### See what users are talking about
Access all the real-time data you need to effectively shape your user engagement strategies:
Discover trending topics posted by users
Track volume and frequency of posts
Easily identify and predict trends
Sentiment Analysis
### Track user emotions in real-time
Understand how your users feel about different topics to create strategies that resonate and drive revenue:
Monitor overall user emotions
Dive deeper into sentiments per topic
Track positive and negative reactions
Content Insights
### Understand user reactions to topics
Dive deeper into sentiments with AI-powered recommendations to guide your strategies:
See detailed post summaries
Understand the emotional context
Get tailored recommendations
## Unlock next level insights with GPT-powered research
Take advantage of everything AI has to offer with our GPT-powered conversational research tool to help you understand your users like never before.
Research Prompt
### Get started with a simple question
Ask a question in Research to get personalized answers based on the content your users post:
Type a question to get started
Or use the prompt templates
Set custom date/time for research
Research Result and Chat
### Interactive insights at your fingertips
The research bot analyzes all your posts to generate detailed research reports:
Get personalized community insights
Dig deeper with follow up questions
Download the final reports
Content Reference
### Ground your research in facts
The research bot gives you access to the original user-generated content cited in the research:
Citation and links included in the research
Click to easily see the original content
History display of research questions
## Data-driven decisions made easy
Access all your live engagement data and analytics from one dashboard to stay updated on your community and make agile decisions.
## Social Analytics
### Content Data
Dive into user-generated content on your platform to create better engagement strategies. See how often users posts, their daily habits on your platform, and so much more.
### User Data
Easily see the growth of your community and identify the top voices leading the way. Access all the user data you need from big picture down to individual members.
## Chat Analytics
### Channel Data
Discover which channels your community prefers for communication, how frequently they send messages, and their active times. Compare the data to the previous month to track your growth or refine your engagement strategies.
### User Data
Gain insights into your chat users with detailed statistics and analytics that help you understand key trends and the overall health of your community's communications.
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus goes beyond offering the complete suite of social features to include powerful tools to analyze, moderate, and monetize your in-app communities.
### Maximize your app's revenue potential with social.plus
Discover how to transform user engagement into unparalleled monetization opportunities with social.plus
Monetization
### Build positive and safe communities
We power moderators with all the necessary tools to control and impose permissions to make your app a safer place for all users.
Moderation

pages.metaTitle: Moderate User-Generated Content with social.plus
pages.metaDescription: Protect your community with advanced AI moderation. social.plus detects and removes harmful content to keep your app safe and trusted.
pages.content:
# Ensure a safe digital space for every user
Elevate user experience with advanced moderation tools, ensuring a vibrant, inclusive, and secure space for all users.
## Moderation Panel
With our Moderation Panel, you can moderate massive amounts of content manually and automatically.
### Equip moderators with the right tools
Easily monitor the environment and save valuable time with automatic and manual moderation capabilities.
### Customize & automate moderation
Automatically filter out profanity and images that contain nudity, violence, suggestive, or disturbing images.
## Protect your community with advanced AI moderation
We use AI for real-time content moderation, creating a safer and more engaging online environment. Our advanced tools detect and manage harmful content seamlessly.
### Pre-Moderation
Automatically review content before it goes live. If the AI confidence score exceeds your set threshold, the content is blocked to protect your community.
### Post-Moderation
Monitor content after itâ€™s published. Based on confidence scores, the system can flag, hide, or remove harmful content without manual intervention.
## Content Moderation
Content moderation is a crucial part of any community to make it a safe space for users. Our tools make it super easy for moderators to track content manually & automatically.
## User Moderation
Content is posted by users, so moderating people is just as important as moderating content. Our tools help your admins and moderators preserve positivity on your platform at all times.
## Administrators & Moderators
Create positive experiences and encourage more engagement on your platform for all members of your community with our administrator & moderator capabilities and customizable user roles.
## Explore more of social.plus
social.plus goes beyond offering the complete suite of social features to include powerful tools to analyze, moderate, and monetize your in-app communities.
### Own and analyze your data in real-time
Access and analyze your engagement data in real-time to gain valuable user insights.
Analytics & Insights
### Maximize your app's revenue potential with social.plus
Discover how to transform user engagement into unparalleled monetization opportunities with social.plus
Monetization

Discover how to transform user engagement into unparalleled monetization opportunities with social.plus
## Drive revenue with embedded commerce and tailored campaigns
Integrate direct commerce into your platform, fostering an interactive and transactional social ecosystem.

Partner with brands to leverage your communityâ€™s potential, enriching the user experience while boosting your revenue.

Lease spaces to partners with official groups, creating a new revenue stream and enriching your community with fresh content and added credibility.
Drive engagement with partner brands

Enable partners to sell directly through groups

Generate revenue by offering sponsored native placements to your partners. Select partners that align with your audience to maximize revenue potential.
A variety of placement options
Native placements for optimal UX
Manage sponsored content in the social.plus Console
## Make your community exclusive with in-app subscription models
Drive sustainable revenue and offer value through tailored subscription options.
Paid subscriptions

Include your community in the subscription tiers you offer to encourage user investment in your app's unique experiences and ensure a steady revenue stream.

Build exclusive spaces where subscribers can interact, share, and engage with content not available to the general audience, incentivizing others to join.

Bridge the gap between content and conversion by letting users tag, discover, and interact with products and offering without ever leaving your platform.

pages.metaTitle: Social SDK | Build Social Features with API-based Social SDKs
pages.metaDescription: Build engaging social features in your app with Social SDKs for iOS, Android, Flutter, React, JavaScript, TypeScript, Ionic, Vue.js, and Angular.
pages.content:
# Build social network features with Social SDK
With social.plus Social SDK, you have everything you need to build in-app community and social media experiences, without the hassle of deploying and maintaining any server infrastructure.
Documentation
## Get started with social.plus
Build engaging social network features in your app with our Social APIs and SDKs for Android, iOS, Flutter, React, React Native, TypeScript, Ionic, Vue.js, and Angular.
## Android Social SDK
The social.plus Android SDK is a feature rich software development kit, empowering you to start building social features in your app.
## iOS Social SDK
Do you want to add engaging social network features to your iOS app with Swift or Objective-C? With our iOS SDK, you'll be up and running in no time.
## Flutter Social SDK
Start building social experiences in your app. Use our Social Network SDK natively to support your applications built using the Flutter framework.
## React Social SDK
Use social.plus SDK to start building customized social network experiences in your ReactJS web app.
## React Native Social SDK
The social.plus SDK lets you build custom social experiences that look and feel native on iOS and Android.
## TypeScript Social SDK
Looking to build social media features in your app with TypeScript? The social.plus SDK for TypeScript has everything you need.
## Angular Social SDK
Our social.plus SDK lets you build custom social experiences in your Angular framework-based app.
## Ionic Social SDK
With social.plus SDK you have everything you need to build social media features in your Ionic framework-based app.

pages.metaTitle: Social UI Kit | Pre-built UIKit for iOS, Android, Flutter and React
pages.metaDescription: Integrate social features with ready-to-use UIKits and UI components from social.plus. Fully customizable, fast to ship, and on-brand.
pages.content:
# Save time with ready-to-use UIKits
Our white-label social network UIKit includes user interfaces and components to seamlessly integrate social media features into applications, and can be fully customized to meet your app's unique requirements.
Access Figma UI Kit
## Open Source Social UIKits
You can fork our UIKit source code to gain complete control over the visual style of the social media features in your app. Customize targeted UX flows, specific views, and respond to user interactions to tailor the user experience specifically for your application.
## iOS UIKit
social.plus provides all the building blocks you need to start building social network functionalities into your iOS app.
## Android UIKit

## React UIKit

pages.content:
# Elevate your app experience with Stories
Unlock a new dimension of engagement and storytelling for your community with our versatile Stories.
## Why Stories?
Boost your app's growth and engagement with integrated stories, providing a space for expression and opportunities for targeted promotions.
### Increase user engagement
With stories, every piece of content gets its moment in the spotlight, ensuring that your users never miss out on important updates or promotions.
### Drive sales with every click
Turn passive viewing into active buying by embedding direct product links in your stories. This seamless integration allows users to effortlessly swipe up and make purchases.
### Enable experts to share knowledge and insights
Allow experts and influencers to share their knowledge, tips, and insights. This not only enriches your content offering but also strengthens credibility and trustworthiness.
### Boost brand and partner visibility with promotions
Short-form content with Stories offers a dynamic way to spotlight brand and partner promotions.
## Empower your stories with advanced features
All the features you need to create a top-notch Stories experience for your users and drive engagement.

pages.metaTitle: social.plus vs Stream | Which platform is right for your product?
pages.metaDescription: Compare social.plus and Stream on features, pricing, and integration to find the right in-app community infrastructure for your product.
pages.content:
# Which platform is right for your product?
Compare social.plus and Stream to find the best fit for your appâ€™s social engagement needs. See how they stack up in features, customization, AI capabilities, and scalability.
## How does social.plus compare with Stream?
social.plus and Stream are both powerful API-driven solutions for integrating social and chat features into applications. While both offer robust SDKs and developer flexibility, social.plus provides a full social suite with UIKit for customization, advanced moderation tools, AI-driven insights, and in-depth analytics. Stream focuses on high-performance chat and activity feeds, with strong moderation and developer control.
SDKs
UIKits
APIs
Solutions overview
## SDKs
Feature-rich toolkit for building apps across platforms and developer languages, enabling efficient feature integration
Social+
Stream
Profiles
Activity feeds
Groups
Stories
Chat
Video and audio call
Livestream
## UIKits
User interfaces and components that can be fully customized to meet your app's unique requirements.
Social+
Stream
Profiles
Activity feeds
Groups
Stories
Chat
Video and audio call
Livestream
Design files
## APIs
User interfaces and components that can be fully customized to meet your app's unique requirements.
Social+
Stream
Profiles
Activity feeds
Groups
Stories
Chat
Video and audio call
Livestream
## Solutions overview
Compare platform capabilities, from integration approach to built-in growth tools, to understand which solution best suits your needs.
social.plus
Stream
Integration approach
API/SDK-driven with UIKit 4.0, offering both low-code customization and open-source flexibility.
API/SDK-driven with high developer control. Various sample applications available for key use cases.
UI customization
Fully customizable, supporting both quick out-of-the-box configurations and deep open-source modifications.
Developers must build their own UI components, though detailed sample applications are provided.
Ads & sponsored content
Native advertising solutions with sponsored content features.
Does not include built-in ad or sponsored content features.
Analytics
Complete social and chat analytics AI-powered insights to analyze community trends, sentiments, and engagement.
Basic analytics to track user interactions and behaviors.
Moderation tools
AI-driven moderation with customizable rules and filtering.
Advanced moderation with auto-moderation, flagging, and profanity filters.
### Who is social.plus best suited for?
social.plus is ideal for companies seeking a full social engagement suite beyond chat and feeds. With AI-powered insights, built-in monetization, and flexible moderation, itâ€™s designed for product teams and developers who need scalability and deep customization. social.plus UIKits offers both quick configurations and open-source flexibility, making social.plus a strong choice for driving engagement and revenue.
### Who is Stream best suited for?
Stream is best for developers needing high-performance chat and feeds with strong moderation. It offers detailed documentation and sample apps, allowing for flexible integration. While great for real-time communication, its UI components require custom development, making it well-suited for teams that prefer full control over their front-end implementation.
